headline: Direct lending stress is growing on multiple fronts – Moody’s Ratings
summary: Stress indicators are worsening in the direct lending market, according to Moody’s Ratings, which characterized the recent bout of market volatility as the “first real test” for private credit. Liquidity is declining among borrowers, among which an increasing proportion are rated Caa1 or below, according to an April 22 sector report that examined 1,909 middle-market issuers from its credit estimates universe. PIK usage has also remained elevated. The picture is similar in Europe, where Moody’s s

headline: Moody's (MCO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Both MIS and MA grew revenues by 8% and disciplined cost management drove 150 basis points of adjusted operating margin to 53.2%.  In analytics, engagement is strongest and our largest, most strategic relationships, which continue to grow materially faster in a broader MA base, and we have a growing pipeline of some of the world's largest financial institutions to consume our agent ready intelligence, and that's supported by further expansion with our hyperscaler and AI partners.

headline: Moody's Boosts Buybacks To $2.5 Billion Following Q1 Earnings Beat
summary: Moody's (MCO) shares surge over 3% following a record-breaking first quarter driven by $2 trillion in rated issuance. With earnings beating estimates and share buybacks boosted to $2.5 billion, see why management raised its full-year 2026 outlook.

headline: Moody’s (NYSE:MCO) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: Credit rating agency Moody's (NYSE:MCO) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 8.1% year on year to $2.08 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.33 per share was 2.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Moody's upgraded AB Artea bankas ratings and its outlook
summary: On 21 April 2026, the international rating agency Moody’s Ratings (Moody’s) upgraded AB Artea bankas long-term deposit rating from Baa1 to A3 and revised the outlook from stable to positive. Moody's also revised the outlook on AB Artea bankas senior unsecured debt rating from stable to positive, while affirming the Baa1 rating. “Moody’s positively assessed the strategic changes currently underway at the organization, which are expected to drive higher profitability through more efficient operati
